name: UseZombie
description: Agent Delivery Control Plane — long-lived, event-driven autonomous workers (Zombies) scoped to a workspace.

operations.description: Provision a new Zombie in the given workspace. Returns the zombie_id used for subsequent operations.
Partial update of a Zombie. Body fields are optional and presence-based: config_json (replace config) and/or status:"killed" (cancel any in-flight executor session and mark the Zombie killed).
Inject a steering instruction into a running Zombie's loop.
List the Zombie's event history with pagination.
Server-Sent Events stream of new events as they arrive.
Deliver an inbound event to a Zombie. Validated against the Zombie's trigger token; idempotent within 24h via event_id.
Pause or unpause admission of new work for a workspace.
Synchronous tool execution proxy. External agents (LangGraph, CrewAI, Composio) call this with their API key and a tool name; the tool result returns inline.

revenue.description: Users supply their own LLM API keys. UseZombie bills per agent-second. Never stores LLM costs.
